variants.title: HiFi Filter SAO 16890 Engine Breather Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SAO 16890 Engine Breather Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SAO 16890 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Fleetguard CV50634 Crankcase Ventilation | Replaces the HiFi Filter SAO 16890
variants.description: Fleetguard® CV50634 premium impactor variable unit crankcase ventilation features patented technologies that provide superior aerosol filtration and collection throughout the life of the engine.
